title: MeshCore app interface to Zephyr firmware
description: Why this exists: MeshCore users and tools may be an adjacent adoption path, and the Zephyr firmware needs a deliberate compatibility boundary if MeshCore app clients are to interact with a LICHEN node locally. What needs to be done: investigate MeshCore app transport/framing expectations, define the supported local interface subset, implement or scaffold Zephyr-side adaptation to LICHEN local CoAP/config/message/status resources, and document semantic differences from MeshCore mesh behavior. Do not change LICHEN over-the-air protocol behavior to match MeshCore. Acceptance criteria: MeshCore app protocol assumptions are captured; supported/unsupported command matrix exists; local transport and framing are implemented or split into child Beads; config/status/message flows have tests or documented manual test procedure; interoperability limitations are documented; two code-review passes are completed before closure.
notes:
Detailed implementation breakdown added for MeshCore app/client compatibility.

New child Beads under project-LICHEN-9c4y:
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.1: research MeshCore app transport/API/protocol subset with source refs and commit SHAs.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.2: define MeshCore-to-LICHEN mapping contract and unsupported-feature policy.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.3: choose bounded MeshCore message codec/schema strategy for Zephyr.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.4: implement MeshCore-compatible local transport surface.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.5: implement stream framing, bounded reassembly, dispatcher, and unknown-command handling.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.6: implement node identity, status, and config read handlers.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.7: translate MeshCore client message sends into the LICHEN local message interface.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.8: surface incoming LICHEN messages/status as MeshCore client-visible events.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.9: return deterministic errors/no-ops for unsupported MeshCore operations.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.10: build native_sim MeshCore app-compat test harness.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.11: define/execute real MeshCore app/client smoke test when hardware/client access is available.
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.12: document MeshCore compatibility support matrix.

Sequencing dependencies start with protocol research, then mapping/codec/transport, then framing/handlers/errors, then native_sim tests, then client smoke test and docs.

Scope reminder: this is local MeshCore app/client compatibility only. It must not imply MeshCore RF interoperability; LICHEN remains the RF/mesh protocol.
close_reason: Complete: MeshCore app interface implemented (25+ sub-tasks done, 1 in-progress settings persistence)
